testcase.name: test_warung_sari_has_mode_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Product Kopi Test Updated missing available_days assert 'available_days' in {'created_at': '2026-04-29T04:33:24.419041+00:00', 'description': 'desc', 'hashtags': ['#test'], 'ig_caption': 'IG cap', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_modes.py:128: in test_warung_sari_has_mode_fields assert "available_days" in p, f"Product {p.get('name')} missing available_days" E AssertionError: Product Kopi Test Updated missing available_days E assert 'available_days' in {'created_at': '2026-04-29T04:33:24.419041+00:00', 'description': 'desc', 'hashtags': ['#test'], 'ig_caption': 'IG cap', ...}
